files.mg_03863.v:
module mg_03863(input wire prev,input wire req,output reg next,input wire loop_in,output reg loop_out);
always @* 
  begin 
  if( prev ) 
  begin 
  loop_out = 1'b1; 
  end 
  else 
  begin 
  loop_out = req ? 1'b0 : loop_in; 
  end 
  end 
  always @* 
  begin 
  next = req ? loop_in : 1'b0; 
  end 
 endmodule
files.mg_03863_combined.v:
module mg_03863(input wire prev,input wire req,output reg next,input wire loop_in,output reg loop_out);
always @* 
  begin 
  if( prev ) 
  begin 
  loop_out = 1'b1; 
  end 
  else 
  begin 
  loop_out = req ? 1'b0 : loop_in; 
  end 
  end 
  always @* 
  begin 
  next = req ? loop_in : 1'b0; 
  end 
 endmodule

      .MODE("SP"),
      .REGMODE_A("NOREG"),

      .IMPLEMENT("9K"),
      .DEBUGGABLE("NO"),
      .PACKABLE("YES"),
      .INIT_FILE("../cursor/cursors.mif"),
      .FILL_ALL("NONE")

      .dia  ({16{1'b0}}),

      .addra(addra),

      .cea  (1'b1),

      .clkb (1'b0),

      .doa  (doa),
      .dob  ()
  );

files.autovcoder_017616.v:
module autovcoder_017616 (
    op,
    shamt,
    d_in,
    d_out,
    do_next
);  //cc logic
  input [2:0] op;  // 3bits input op
  input [1:0] shamt;  // 2bits input shamt
  input [7:0] d_in;  // 8bits input d_in
  input [7:0] d_out;  // 8bits input d_out
  output [7:0] do_next;  // 8bits output do_next
  reg  [7:0] do_next;  // 8bits reg do_next

  wire [7:0] d_lsl;  // 8bits wire d_lsl
  wire [7:0] d_lsr;  // 8bits wire d_lsr
  wire [7:0] d_asr;  // 8bits wire d_asr

  parameter NOP = 3'b000;  // define NOP  = 000
  parameter LOAD = 3'b001;  // define LOAD = 001
  parameter LSL = 3'b010;  // define LSL  = 010
  parameter LSR = 3'b011;  // define LSR  = 011
  parameter ASR = 3'b100;  // define ASR  = 100

  always @(op, shamt, d_in, d_out, d_lsl, d_lsr, d_asr) begin
    case (op)
      NOP: do_next <= d_out;  // when NOP,  do_next = d_out
      LOAD: do_next <= d_in;  // when LOAD, do_next = d_in
      LSL: do_next <= d_lsl;  // when LSL,  do_next = d_lsl
      LSR: do_next <= d_lsr;  // when LSR,  do_next = d_lsr
      ASR: do_next <= d_asr;  // when ASR,  do_next = d_asr
      default: do_next <= 8'bx;  // when default, do_next = unknown

    endcase
  end

  LSL8 U0_LSL8 (
      .d_in (d_out),
      .shamt(shamt),
      .d_out(d_lsl)
  );  // instance by using LSL8, LSR8 and ASR8
  LSR8 U1_LSR8 (
      .d_in (d_out),
      .shamt(shamt),
      .d_out(d_lsr)
  );
  ASR8 U2_ASR8 (
      .d_in (d_out),
      .shamt(shamt),
      .d_out(d_asr)
  );

endmodule

files.autovcoder_012873.v:
module autovcoder_012873 (
    O,
    P,
    Q,
    R,
    S,
    T,
    U,
    V,
    YY
);

  input O, P, Q, R, S, T, U, V;
  output YY;

  and2 Ao5a_0 (
      .A(P),
      .B(Q),
      .Y(line0)
  );
  and3 Ao5a_1 (
      .A(P),
      .B(R),
      .C(S),
      .Y(line1)
  );
  and4 Ao5a_2 (
      .A(P),
      .B(R),
      .C(T),
      .D(U),
      .Y(line2)
  );
  and4 Ao5a_3 (
      .A(P),
      .B(R),
      .C(T),
      .D(V),
      .Y(line3)
  );
  or5 Ao5a_4 (
      .A(O),
      .B(line0),
      .C(line1),
      .D(line2),
      .E(line3),
      .Y(YY)
  );

endmodule

    parameter OPTION_RCLK = "POS"
) (
    input CLK_CLK,
    input PORT_R_CLK,
    input [9:0] PORT_R_ADDR,
    output [PORT_R_WIDTH-1:0] PORT_R_RD_DATA,
    input PORT_W_CLK,
    input PORT_W_WR_EN,
    input [9:0] PORT_W_ADDR,
    input [PORT_W_WIDTH-1:0] PORT_W_WR_DATA
);

    reg [PORT_R_WIDTH-1:0] mem [1023:0];
    reg [PORT_R_WIDTH-1:0] rd_data_reg;

    initial begin
        for (int i = 0; i < 1024; i++) begin
            mem[i] = INIT;
        end
    end

    always @(posedge PORT_R_CLK) begin
        if (OPTION_RCLK == "POS") begin
            rd_data_reg <= mem[PORT_R_ADDR];
        end
        else if (OPTION_RCLK == "NEG") begin
            rd_data_reg <= mem[PORT_R_ADDR];
        end
    end

    always @(posedge PORT_W_CLK) begin
        if (OPTION_WCLK == "POS") begin
            if (PORT_W_WR_EN) begin
                mem[PORT_W_ADDR] <= PORT_W_WR_DATA;
            end
        end
        else if (OPTION_WCLK == "NEG") begin
            if (PORT_W_WR_EN) begin
                mem[PORT_W_ADDR] <= PORT_W_WR_DATA;
            end
        end
    end

    assign PORT_R_RD_DATA = rd_data_reg;

endmodule

module rtlpp_03806 (
    input              clk,                
    input              reset_,
    input              tx_mac_wr,
    input  [63 : 0]    tx_mac_data,
    output	           tx_mac_full,
    output [12 : 0]    tx_mac_usedw,
    output [63 : 0]	   rx_mac_data,
    output [ 7 : 0]	   rx_mac_ctrl,
    output 			   rx_mac_empty,
    input			   rx_mac_rd,
    input		       cs_fifo_rd_en,
    output		       cs_fifo_empty,
    output [63 : 0]	   ipcs_fifo_dout,
    output [7 : 0]    	gmii_txd,
    input  [7 : 0]      gmii_rxd,
    input      			gmii_rx_er,
    output		       xauiA_linkup,
    input  [15 : 0]	   host_addr_reg,
    input  [ 3 : 0]	   SYS_ADDR,
    input			   fail_over,
    input  [31 : 0]	   fmac_ctrl,
    input  [31 : 0]	   fmac_ctrl1,
    input			   fmac_rxd_en,
    input  [31 : 0]	   mac_pause_value,
    input  [47 : 0]	   mac_addr0,
    input			   reg_rd_start,
    output			   reg_rd_done_out,
    output 				gmii_tx_er,
    output [31 : 0]	   FMAC_REGDOUT,
    output			   FIFO_OV_IPEND,
    input [1:0] 		fmac_speed,
    input 				gmii_rx_dv,
    output 				gmii_tx_en
);       

wire gmii_tx_vld;

// Logic previously in the LMAC_CORE_TOP module
// Start conversion of LMAC_CORE_TOP functionality
assign gmii_tx_en = gmii_tx_vld; // Example logic based on understanding

// More internal logic and replacement of functionality goes here
// Inputs handling
wire     [63:0] dummy_rx_mac_data = 64'd0; // Example placeholder
wire     [7:0]  dummy_rx_mac_ctrl = 8'd0;  // Example placeholder
wire     dummy_rx_mac_empty = 1'b0;        // Example placeholder
assign  rx_mac_data = dummy_rx_mac_data;
assign  rx_mac_ctrl = dummy_rx_mac_ctrl;
assign  rx_mac_empty = dummy_rx_mac_empty;

// Example internal logic based on understanding of LMAC_CORE_TOP's functionality
assign tx_mac_full = 1'b0;   // placeholder for internal tx full signal
assign tx_mac_usedw = 13'd0; // placeholder for tx used words
assign rx_mac_empty = 1'b0;  // placeholder for rx empty signal
assign gmii_tx_er = 1'b0;    // placeholder for tx error signal
assign xauiA_linkup = 1'b1;  // placeholder for xaui linkup status

assign cs_fifo_empty = 1'b0; // example placeholder
assign ipcs_fifo_dout = 64'd0; // example placeholder

assign FMAC_REGDOUT = 32'd0; // example placeholder for FMAC reg output
assign FIFO_OV_IPEND = 1'b0; // example placeholder for FIFO overflow interrupt pending
assign reg_rd_done_out = 1'b1; // example placeholder for register read done

// Correct way to ensure gmii_tx_vld as per system specifics
assign gmii_tx_vld = !tx_mac_full && tx_mac_wr;
// End of placeholders for internal logic replacement

endmodule

files.autovcoder_079109.v:
module autovcoder_079109 (
	address_a,
	address_b,
	byteena_b,
	clock_a,
	clock_b,
	data_a,
	data_b,
	wren_a,
	wren_b,
	q_a,
	q_b);

	input	[14:0]  address_a;
	input	[14:0]  address_b;
	input	[3:0]  byteena_b;
	input	  clock_a;
	input	  clock_b;
	input	[31:0]  data_a;
	input	[31:0]  data_b;
	input	  wren_a;
	input	  wren_b;
	output	[31:0]  q_a;
	output	[31:0]  q_b;
`ifndef ALTERA_RESERVED_QIS
// synopsys translate_off
`endif
	tri1	[3:0]  byteena_b;
	tri1	  clock_a;
	tri0	  wren_a;
	tri0	  wren_b;
`ifndef ALTERA_RESERVED_QIS
// synopsys translate_on
`endif

	wire [31:0] sub_wire0;
	wire [31:0] sub_wire1;
	wire [31:0] q_a = sub_wire0[31:0];
	wire [31:0] q_b = sub_wire1[31:0];

	altsyncram	altsyncram_component (
				.clock0 (clock_a),
				.wren_a (wren_a),
				.address_b (address_b),
				.byteena_b (byteena_b),
				.clock1 (clock_b),
				.data_b (data_b),
				.wren_b (wren_b),
				.address_a (address_a),
				.data_a (data_a),
				.q_a (sub_wire0),
				.q_b (sub_wire1),
				.aclr0 (1'b0),
				.aclr1 (1'b0),
				.addressstall_a (1'b0),
				.addressstall_b (1'b0),
				.byteena_a (1'b1),
				.clocken0 (1'b1),
				.clocken1 (1'b1),
				.clocken2 (1'b1),
				.clocken3 (1'b1),
				.eccstatus (),
				.rden_a (1'b1),
				.rden_b (1'b1));
	defparam
		altsyncram_component.address_reg_b = "CLOCK1",
		altsyncram_component.byteena_reg_b = "CLOCK1",
		altsyncram_component.byte_size = 8,
		altsyncram_component.clock_enable_input_a = "BYPASS",
		altsyncram_component.clock_enable_input_b = "BYPASS",
		altsyncram_component.clock_enable_output_a = "BYPASS",
		altsyncram_component.clock_enable_output_b = "BYPASS",
		altsyncram_component.indata_reg_b = "CLOCK1",
		altsyncram_component.init_file = "display.mif",
		altsyncram_component.intended_device_family = "Cyclone II",
		altsyncram_component.lpm_type = "altsyncram",
		altsyncram_component.numwords_a = 19200,
		altsyncram_component.numwords_b = 19200,
		altsyncram_component.operation_mode = "BIDIR_DUAL_PORT",
		altsyncram_component.outdata_aclr_a = "NONE",
		altsyncram_component.outdata_aclr_b = "NONE",
		altsyncram_component.outdata_reg_a = "CLOCK0",
		altsyncram_component.outdata_reg_b = "CLOCK1",
		altsyncram_component.power_up_uninitialized = "FALSE",
		altsyncram_component.ram_block_type = "M4K",
		altsyncram_component.widthad_a = 15,
		altsyncram_component.widthad_b = 15,
		altsyncram_component.width_a = 32,
		altsyncram_component.width_b = 32,
		altsyncram_component.width_byteena_a = 1,
		altsyncram_component.width_byteena_b = 4,
		altsyncram_component.wrcontrol_wraddress_reg_b = "CLOCK1";


endmodule

files.autovcoder_061468.v:
module autovcoder_061468 (
    input clk48M,
    input reset,

    input [7:0] INP0,
    input [7:0] INP1,
    input [7:0] INP2,

    input [7:0] DSW0,
    input [7:0] DSW1,

    input  [8:0] PH,    // PIXEL H
    input  [8:0] PV,    // PIXEL V
    output       PCLK,  // PIXEL CLOCK (to VGA encoder)
    output [7:0] POUT,  // PIXEL OUT

    output [15:0] SOUT,  // Sound Out (PCM)


    input    ROMCL,  // Downloaded ROM image
    input   [24:0] ROMAD,
    input   [7:0] ROMDT,
    input    ROMEN
);

  // Clocks
  wire clk24M, clk12M, clk6M, clk3M, clk8M;
  CLKGEN clks (
      clk48M,
      clk24M,
      clk12M,
      clk6M,
      clk3M,
      clk8M
  );

  // CPU
  wire    CPUCLn;
  wire [15:0] CPUAD;
  wire [7:0] CPUDO, VIDDO;
  wire CPUWR, VIDCS, VBLK;
  wire SNDRQ;

  FlickyMAIN Main (
      .RESET (reset),
      .INP0  (INP0),
      .INP1  (INP1),
      .INP2  (INP2),
      .DSW0  (DSW0),
      .DSW1  (DSW1),
      .CLK48M(clk48M),
      .CLK3M (clk3M),
      .CPUCLn(CPUCLn),
      .CPUAD (CPUAD),
      .CPUDO (CPUDO),
      .CPUWR (CPUWR),
      .VBLK  (VBLK),
      .VIDCS (VIDCS),
      .VIDDO (VIDDO),
      .SNDRQ (SNDRQ),

      .ROMCL(ROMCL),
      .ROMAD(ROMAD),
      .ROMDT(ROMDT),
      .ROMEN(ROMEN)
  );

  // Video
  FlickyVIDEO Video (
      .VCLKx8(clk48M),
      .VCLKx4(clk24M),
      .VCLKx2(clk12M),
      .VCLK(clk6M),
      .PH(PH),
      .PV(PV),
      .VBLK(VBLK),
      .RGB8(POUT),
      .PALDSW(1'b0),

      .cpu_cl(CPUCLn),
      .cpu_ad(CPUAD),

      .cpu_dr(VIDDO),

      .ROMCL(ROMCL),
      .ROMAD(ROMAD),
      .ROMDT(ROMDT),
      .ROMEN(ROMEN)
  );
  assign PCLK = clk6M;

  // Sound
  FlickySND Sound (
      clk8M,
      reset,
      CPUDO,
      SNDRQ,
      SOUT,
      ROMCL,
      ROMAD,
      ROMDT,
      ROMEN
  );

endmodule

files.autovcoder_004079.v:
module autovcoder_004079 (  /*AUTOARG*/
    // Outputs
    wb_wre_o,
    wb_stb_o,
    wb_sel_o,
    wb_dat_o,
    wb_adr_o,
    // Inputs
    wb_dat_i,
    wb_ack_i,
    sys_rst_i,
    sys_int_i,
    sys_exc_i,
    sys_clk_i
);
  /* Bus Address Width */
  parameter ASIZ = 32;
  parameter CSIZ = 7;
  /* DO NOT TOUCH */
  parameter DSIZ = ASIZ;
  parameter ISIZ = ASIZ;

  /*AUTOOUTPUT*/
  // Beginning of automatic outputs (from unused autoinst outputs)
  output [ASIZ-1:0] wb_adr_o;  // From wbbus of aeMB_wbbus.v
  output [31:0] wb_dat_o;  // From wbbus of aeMB_wbbus.v
  output [3:0] wb_sel_o;  // From wbbus of aeMB_wbbus.v
  output wb_stb_o;  // From wbbus of aeMB_wbbus.v
  output wb_wre_o;  // From wbbus of aeMB_wbbus.v
  // End of automatics
  /*AUTOINPUT*/
  // Beginning of automatic inputs (from unused autoinst inputs)
  input sys_clk_i;  // To wbbus of aeMB_wbbus.v, ...
  input sys_exc_i;  // To cpu of aeMB_core.v
  input sys_int_i;  // To cpu of aeMB_core.v
  input sys_rst_i;  // To wbbus of aeMB_wbbus.v, ...
  input wb_ack_i;  // To wbbus of aeMB_wbbus.v
  input [31:0] wb_dat_i;  // To wbbus of aeMB_wbbus.v
  // End of automatics
  /*AUTOWIRE*/
  // Beginning of automatic wires (for undeclared instantiated-module outputs)
  wire dwb_ack_i;  // From wbbus of aeMB_wbbus.v
  wire [DSIZ-1:0] dwb_adr_o;  // From cpu of aeMB_core.v
  wire [31:0] dwb_dat_i;  // From wbbus of aeMB_wbbus.v
  wire [31:0] dwb_dat_o;  // From cpu of aeMB_core.v
  wire dwb_stb_o;  // From cpu of aeMB_core.v
  wire dwb_we_o;  // From cpu of aeMB_core.v
  wire iwb_ack_i;  // From wbbus of aeMB_wbbus.v
  wire [ISIZ-1:0] iwb_adr_o;  // From cpu of aeMB_core.v
  wire [31:0] iwb_dat_i;  // From wbbus of aeMB_wbbus.v
  wire iwb_stb_o;  // From cpu of aeMB_core.v
  // End of automatics

  aeMB_wbbus #(ASIZ, CSIZ, ISIZ, DSIZ) wbbus (  /*AUTOINST*/
      // Outputs
      .wb_adr_o (wb_adr_o[ASIZ-1:0]),
      .wb_dat_o (wb_dat_o[31:0]),
      .wb_sel_o (wb_sel_o[3:0]),
      .wb_stb_o (wb_stb_o),
      .wb_wre_o (wb_wre_o),
      .dwb_ack_i(dwb_ack_i),
      .dwb_dat_i(dwb_dat_i[31:0]),
      .iwb_ack_i(iwb_ack_i),
      .iwb_dat_i(iwb_dat_i[31:0]),
      // Inputs
      .wb_dat_i (wb_dat_i[31:0]),
      .wb_ack_i (wb_ack_i),
      .dwb_adr_o(dwb_adr_o[DSIZ-1:0]),
      .dwb_dat_o(dwb_dat_o[31:0]),
      .dwb_stb_o(dwb_stb_o),
      .dwb_we_o (dwb_we_o),
      .iwb_adr_o(iwb_adr_o[ISIZ-1:0]),
      .iwb_stb_o(iwb_stb_o),
      .sys_clk_i(sys_clk_i),
      .sys_rst_i(sys_rst_i)
  );

  aeMB_core #(ISIZ, DSIZ) cpu (  /*AUTOINST*/
      // Outputs
      .dwb_adr_o(dwb_adr_o[DSIZ-1:0]),
      .dwb_dat_o(dwb_dat_o[31:0]),
      .dwb_stb_o(dwb_stb_o),
      .dwb_we_o (dwb_we_o),
      .iwb_adr_o(iwb_adr_o[ISIZ-1:0]),
      .iwb_stb_o(iwb_stb_o),
      // Inputs
      .dwb_ack_i(dwb_ack_i),
      .dwb_dat_i(dwb_dat_i[31:0]),
      .iwb_ack_i(iwb_ack_i),
      .iwb_dat_i(iwb_dat_i[31:0]),
      .sys_clk_i(sys_clk_i),
      .sys_exc_i(sys_exc_i),
      .sys_int_i(sys_int_i),
      .sys_rst_i(sys_rst_i)
  );

endmodule

files.autovcoder_032934.v:
module autovcoder_032934 (
    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    input sel,
    input enable,
    output [7:0] s,
    output cout
);

  wire [1:7] c;
  wire [7:0] w;
  full_adder_substractor
      g0 (
          a[0],
          b[0],
          sel,
          sel,
          w[0],
          c[1]
      ),
      g1 (
          a[1],
          b[1],
          c[1],
          sel,
          w[1],
          c[2]
      ),
      g2 (
          a[2],
          b[2],
          c[2],
          sel,
          w[2],
          c[3]
      ),
      g3 (
          a[3],
          b[3],
          c[3],
          sel,
          w[3],
          c[4]
      ),
      g4 (
          a[4],
          b[4],
          c[4],
          sel,
          w[4],
          c[5]
      ),
      g5 (
          a[5],
          b[5],
          c[5],
          sel,
          w[5],
          c[6]
      ),
      g6 (
          a[6],
          b[6],
          c[6],
          sel,
          w[6],
          c[7]
      ),
      g7 (
          a[7],
          b[7],
          c[7],
          sel,
          w[7],
          cout
      );

  and a7 (
      s[7], w[7], enable
  ), a6 (
      s[6], w[6], enable
  ), a5 (
      s[5], w[5], enable
  ), a4 (
      s[4], w[4], enable
  ), a3 (
      s[3], w[3], enable
  ), a2 (
      s[2], w[2], enable
  ), a1 (
      s[1], w[1], enable
  ), a0 (
      s[0], w[0], enable
  );

endmodule

files.autovcoder_098994.v:
module autovcoder_098994 #(
    parameter RAMLENGTH = 800,  //RAMLENGTH*DATAWIDTH = 4800 = 80x60 RAM RESOLUTION
    DATA_WIDTH = 6,
    V_BOTTOM = 1,
    V_SYNC = 3,
    V_TOP = 30,
    H_FRONT = 80,
    H_SYNC = 136,
    H_BACK = 216,
    RESOLUTION_H = 1280,
    RESOLUTION_V = 960,
    X_WIRE_WIDTH = $clog2(RESOLUTION_H + H_FRONT + H_SYNC + H_BACK),
    Y_WIRE_WIDTH = $clog2(RESOLUTION_V + V_BOTTOM + V_SYNC + V_TOP),
    ADDR_WIDTH = $clog2(RAMLENGTH)
) (
    //input we,
    input display_on,
    clk,
    memreset,
    reset_n,
    input [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] resetcnt,
    input [2:0] RGBin,
    input [X_WIRE_WIDTH-1:0] hpos,
    input [Y_WIRE_WIDTH-1:0] vpos,
    input fifoempty,

    output [2:0] RGB
);

  wire [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] writeR_data, writeG_data, writeB_data, R_data, G_data, B_data;
  wire [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] addrbuf_wire;
  wire we;

  RGBmemcoderdecoderv2  // module for interpreting requests to memory
  #(
      .RESOLUTION_H(RESOLUTION_H),
      .DATA_WIDTH(DATA_WIDTH),
      .X_WIDTH(X_WIRE_WIDTH),
      .Y_WIDTH(Y_WIRE_WIDTH),
      .ADDR_WIDTH(ADDR_WIDTH)
  ) FBCODEC (
      .clk(clk),
      .reset(reset_n),
      .hpos(hpos),
      .vpos(vpos),
      .datafromR(R_data),
      .datafromG(G_data),
      .datafromB(B_data),
      .RGBin(RGBin),
      .display_on(display_on),
      .we(we),
      .RGB(RGB),
      .Rdatatomem(writeR_data),
      .Gdatatomem(writeG_data),
      .Bdatatomem(writeB_data),
      .addr(addrbuf_wire),
      .memenable(memreset),
      .fifoempty(fifoempty)
  );


  single_port_ram #(
      .RAMLENGTH (RAMLENGTH),
      .DATA_WIDTH(DATA_WIDTH),
      .ADDR_WIDTH(ADDR_WIDTH)
  ) R_MEMORY (
      .we(we),
      .clk(clk),
      .memenable(memreset),
      .data(writeR_data),
      .addr(addrbuf_wire),
      .resetcnt(resetcnt),
      .q(R_data)
  );



  single_port_ram #(
      .RAMLENGTH (RAMLENGTH),
      .DATA_WIDTH(DATA_WIDTH),
      .ADDR_WIDTH(ADDR_WIDTH)
  ) G_MEMORY (
      .we(we),
      .clk(clk),
      .memenable(memreset),
      .data(writeG_data),
      .addr(addrbuf_wire),
      .resetcnt(resetcnt),
      .q(G_data)
  );



  single_port_ram #(
      .RAMLENGTH (RAMLENGTH),
      .DATA_WIDTH(DATA_WIDTH),
      .ADDR_WIDTH(ADDR_WIDTH)
  ) B_MEMORY (
      .we(we),
      .clk(clk),
      .memenable(memreset),
      .data(writeB_data),
      .addr(addrbuf_wire),
      .resetcnt(resetcnt),
      .q(B_data)
  );

endmodule

files.autovcoder_059154.v:
module autovcoder_059154 #(
    parameter WIDTH = 36,
    SIZE = 6
) (
    input wclk,
    input [WIDTH-1:0] datain,
    input src_rdy_i,
    output dst_rdy_o,
    output [15:0] space,
    input rclk,
    output [WIDTH-1:0] dataout,
    output src_rdy_o,
    input dst_rdy_i,
    output [15:0] occupied,
    input arst
);

  wire [SIZE:0] level_rclk, level_wclk;  // xilinx adds an extra bit if you ask for accurate levels
  wire full, empty, write, read;

  assign dst_rdy_o = ~full;
  assign src_rdy_o = ~empty;
  assign write     = src_rdy_i & dst_rdy_o;
  assign read      = src_rdy_o & dst_rdy_i;

  generate
    if (WIDTH == 36)
      if (SIZE == 9)
        fifo_xlnx_512x36_2clk fifo_xlnx_512x36_2clk (
            .rst(arst),
            .wr_clk(wclk),
            .din(datain),
            .full(full),
            .wr_en(write),
            .wr_data_count(level_wclk),
            .rd_clk(rclk),
            .dout(dataout),
            .empty(empty),
            .rd_en(read),
            .rd_data_count(level_rclk)
        );
      else if (SIZE == 11)
        fifo_xlnx_2Kx36_2clk fifo_xlnx_2Kx36_2clk (
            .rst(arst),
            .wr_clk(wclk),
            .din(datain),
            .full(full),
            .wr_en(write),
            .wr_data_count(level_wclk),
            .rd_clk(rclk),
            .dout(dataout),
            .empty(empty),
            .rd_en(read),
            .rd_data_count(level_rclk)
        );
      else if (SIZE == 6)
        fifo_xlnx_64x36_2clk fifo_xlnx_64x36_2clk (
            .rst(arst),
            .wr_clk(wclk),
            .din(datain),
            .full(full),
            .wr_en(write),
            .wr_data_count(level_wclk),
            .rd_clk(rclk),
            .dout(dataout),
            .empty(empty),
            .rd_en(read),
            .rd_data_count(level_rclk)
        );
      else
        fifo_xlnx_512x36_2clk fifo_xlnx_512x36_2clk (
            .rst(arst),
            .wr_clk(wclk),
            .din(datain),
            .full(full),
            .wr_en(write),
            .wr_data_count(level_wclk),
            .rd_clk(rclk),
            .dout(dataout),
            .empty(empty),
            .rd_en(read),
            .rd_data_count(level_rclk)
        );
    else if ((WIDTH == 19) | (WIDTH == 18))
      if (SIZE == 4)
        fifo_xlnx_16x19_2clk fifo_xlnx_16x19_2clk (
            .rst(arst),
            .wr_clk(wclk),
            .din(datain),
            .full(full),
            .wr_en(write),
            .wr_data_count(level_wclk),
            .rd_clk(rclk),
            .dout(dataout),
            .empty(empty),
            .rd_en(read),
            .rd_data_count(level_rclk)
        );
  endgenerate

  assign occupied = {{(16 - SIZE - 1) {1'b0}}, level_rclk};
  assign space    = ((1 << SIZE) + 1) - level_wclk;

endmodule

files.autovcoder_123435.v:
module autovcoder_123435 (
                  input        I_clk, // NOT USED
                  input        I_rst_n, // NOT USED
                  input [1:0]  I_sel,   // NOT USED
                  input        I_pll_areset,
                  input        I_tx_inclock,

                  input [39:0] i0_p,
                  input [39:0] i1_p,
                  input [39:0] i2_p,
                  input [39:0] i3_p,
                  input [39:0] i4_p,
                  input [39:0] i5_p,
                  input [39:0] i6_p,
                  input [39:0] i7_p,
                  input [39:0] i8_p,
                  output [8:0] O_tx9_out,
                  output        O_tx_locked,
                  output        O_tx_outclock,
                  output        O_tx_coreclock
                  );

   wire [89:0]                 tx_in;

wire                            tx_locked;

        reg_mux_40_10 reg_mux_40_10_inst0 (
				      .clk       (I_clk),
				      .rst       (I_rst_n),
				      .sel       (I_sel),
                                      .tx_locked (tx_locked),
				      .i_p       (i0_p),
				      .o_p       (tx_in[9:0])
				      );

        reg_mux_40_10 reg_mux_40_10_inst1 (
				      .clk       (I_clk),
				      .rst       (I_rst_n),
				      .sel       (I_sel),
                                      .tx_locked (tx_locked),
				      .i_p       (i1_p),
				      .o_p       (tx_in[19:10])
				      );

        reg_mux_40_10 reg_mux_40_10_inst2 (
				      .clk       (I_clk),
				      .rst       (I_rst_n),
				      .sel       (I_sel),
                                      .tx_locked (tx_locked),
				      .i_p       (i2_p),
				      .o_p       (tx_in[29:20])
				      );

        reg_mux_40_10 reg_mux_40_10_inst3 (
				      .clk       (I_clk),
				      .rst       (I_rst_n),
				      .sel       (I_sel),
                                      .tx_locked (tx_locked),
				      .i_p       (i3_p),
				      .o_p       (tx_in[39:30])
				      );

        reg_mux_40_10 reg_mux_40_10_inst4 (
				      .clk       (I_clk),
				      .rst       (I_rst_n),
				      .sel       (I_sel),
                                      .tx_locked (tx_locked),
				      .i_p       (i4_p),
				      .o_p       (tx_in[49:40])
				      );

        reg_mux_40_10 reg_mux_40_10_inst5 (
				      .clk       (I_clk),
				      .rst       (I_rst_n),
				      .sel       (I_sel),
                                      .tx_locked (tx_locked),
				      .i_p       (i5_p),
				      .o_p       (tx_in[59:50])
				      );

        reg_mux_40_10 reg_mux_40_10_inst6 (
				      .clk       (I_clk),
				      .rst       (I_rst_n),
				      .sel       (I_sel),
                                      .tx_locked (tx_locked),
				      .i_p       (i6_p),
				      .o_p       (tx_in[69:60])
				      );

        reg_mux_40_10 reg_mux_40_10_inst7 (
				      .clk       (I_clk),
				      .rst       (I_rst_n),
				      .sel       (I_sel),
                                      .tx_locked (tx_locked),
				      .i_p       (i7_p),
				      .o_p       (tx_in[79:70])
				      );

        reg_mux_40_10 reg_mux_40_10_inst8 (
				      .clk       (I_clk),
				      .rst       (I_rst_n),
				      .sel       (I_sel),
                                      .tx_locked (tx_locked),
				      .i_p       (i8_p),
				      .o_p       (tx_in[89:80])
				      );



//



`ifdef  BOARD_7406
 s4_lvds_tx9
`else
 s3_lvds_tx9
`endif
 lvds_tx9_inst(
	                      .pll_areset     (I_pll_areset),
	                      .tx_in          (tx_in),
	                      .tx_inclock     (I_tx_inclock),
	                      .tx_coreclock   (O_tx_coreclock),
                              .tx_locked      (tx_locked),
	                      .tx_out         (O_tx9_out),
                              .tx_outclock    (O_tx_outclock)
                              );

assign O_tx_locked = tx_locked;

endmodule

files.autovcoder_142186.v:
module autovcoder_142186 (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input [7:0] data_in,
    input send,       
    output reg [7:0] data_out,
    output reg error,
    output reg request,
    input ack
);
    reg [2:0] attempt_count;
    reg [7:0] current_data;
    reg parity;

    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            attempt_count <= 0;
            request <= 0;
            error <= 0;
            data_out <= 0;
        end else begin
            if (send) begin
                current_data <= data_in;
                parity <= ^current_data; // Calculate parity
                data_out <= {current_data, parity}; // Send data with parity
                attempt_count <= attempt_count + 1;
                request <= 0; // No request initially
            end
            
            if (ack) begin
                if (parity == 1'b1) begin // If parity bit is 1, no error
                    attempt_count <= 0; // Reset on successful reception
                    request <= 0;
                end else begin
                    error <= 1; // Error detected
                    request <= 1; // Request retransmission
                end
            end
            
            if (attempt_count >= 3) begin
                // Handle maximum retry
                attempt_count <= 0; // Reset attempt count
                request <= 0; // Stop requests after max attempts
            end
        end
    end
endmodule

                .C_EN_SAFETY_CKT(0),
                .C_COUNT_36K_BRAM("0"),
                .C_COUNT_18K_BRAM("1"),
                .C_EST_POWER_SUMMARY("Estimated Power for IP     :     2.7928 mW")
            ) u_prim_width (
                .douta(douta_array[i]),
                .clka(clka),
                .addra(addra)
            );
        end
    endgenerate

    genvar j;
    generate
        for (j = 0; j < 22; j = j + 1) begin : gen_output
            assign douta[18*j+17:18*j] = douta_array[j];
        end
    endgenerate

endmodule

    parameter C_WRITE_DEPTH_B = 1024,
    parameter C_READ_DEPTH_B = 1024,
    parameter C_ADDRB_WIDTH = 10,
    parameter C_RST_PRIORITY_B = "CE",
    parameter C_RSTRAM_B = 0,
    parameter C_INITB_VAL = "0",
    parameter C_HAS_ENB = 0,
    parameter C_HAS_REGCEB = 0,
    parameter C_USE_BYTE_WEB = 0,
    parameter C_WEB_WIDTH = 1,
    parameter C_WRITE_MODE_B = "WRITE_FIRST",
    parameter C_MEMORY_SIZE = 18432,
    parameter C_WRITE_WIDTH_A_CORE = 18,
    parameter C_READ_WIDTH_A_CORE = 18,
    parameter C_MEMORY_PRIMITIVE = "auto",
    parameter C_COMMON_CLK = 0,
    parameter C_DISABLE_WARN_BHV_COLL = 0,
    parameter C_EN_SLEEP_PIN = 0,
    parameter C_USE_URAM = 0,
    parameter C_EN_RDADDRA_CHG = 0,
    parameter C_EN_RDADDRB_CHG = 0,
    parameter C_EN_DEEPSLEEP_PIN = 0,
    parameter C_EN_SHUTDOWN_PIN = 0,
    parameter C_EN_SAFETY_CKT = 0,
    parameter C_COUNT_36K_BRAM = "0",
    parameter C_COUNT_18K_BRAM = "1",
    parameter C_EST_POWER_SUMMARY = "Estimated Power for IP     :     2.7928 mW"
) (
    output reg [17:0] douta,
    input clka,
    input [9:0] addra
);

    // Simplified memory block implementation
    reg [17:0] mem [0:1023];

    always @(posedge clka) begin
        douta <= mem[addra];
    end

endmodule

files.origen_188052.v:
module origen_188052(
    input go,
    input [7:0] x_lane0, x_lane1, x_lane2, x_lane3, x_lane4,
    input [6:0] y_lane0, y_lane1, y_lane2, y_lane3, y_lane4,
    input [7:0] x_dot,
    input [6:0] y_dot,
    input CLK,
    output reg resetn
);

always @(posedge CLK) begin
    if (resetn) begin
        case (y_dot)
            y_lane0[6:0]: begin
                if (x_lane0 <= x_dot && x_dot <= x_lane1) begin
                    resetn <= 1'b0;
                end
            end
            y_lane1[6:0]: begin
                if (x_lane1 <= x_dot && x_dot <= x_lane2) begin
                    resetn <= 1'b0;
                end
            end
            y_lane2[6:0]: begin
                if (x_lane2 <= x_dot && x_dot <= x_lane3) begin
                    resetn <= 1'b0;
                end
            end
            y_lane3[6:0]: begin
                if (x_lane3 <= x_dot && x_dot <= x_lane4) begin
                    resetn <= 1'b0;
                end
            end
            y_lane4[6:0]: begin
                if (x_lane4 <= x_dot) begin
                    resetn <= 1'b0;
                end
            end
        endcase
    end else begin
        if (go) begin
            resetn <= 1'b1;
        end
    end
end

initial begin
    resetn = 1'b1;
end

endmodule

    output [19:0] io_output,  // @[:@6.4]
    input  [ 9:0] io_taps_0,  // @[:@6.4]
    input  [ 9:0] io_taps_1,  // @[:@6.4]
    input  [ 9:0] io_taps_2   // @[:@6.4]
);

  reg [31:0] _RAND_1;
  reg [31:0] _RAND_2;

    _T_14 <= $signed(io_input) * $signed(io_taps_2);  // @[SIntTypeClass.scala 44:41:@11.4]
    _T_19 <= $signed(_T_14) + $signed(products_1);  // @[SIntTypeClass.scala 18:40:@19.4]
  end

`endif

`endif

    _RAND_1 = {1{`RANDOM}};

files.origen_185965.v:
module origen_185965 #(
    parameter NUMADDR = 256,
    parameter BITADDR = 8,
    parameter BITDATA = 32,
    parameter SRAM_DELAY = 2,
    parameter RSTINIT = 0,
    parameter RSTSTRT = 0,
    parameter RSTINCR = 1,
    parameter FORMAL_FULL = 0,
    parameter FORMAL_SELECT = 0
) (
    input                   clk,
    input                   rst,
    input                   read_0,
    input [BITADDR-1:0]     rd_adr_0,
    input                   write_1,
    input [BITADDR-1:0]     wr_adr_1,
    input [BITDATA-1:0]     wr_din_1,
    input [BITADDR-1:0]     select_adr,
    output                  ready,
    output [BITDATA-1:0]    rd_dout_0
);

    reg [BITDATA-1:0] memory [0:NUMADDR-1];
    reg [BITADDR-1:0] read_delay_cnt;
    reg [BITDATA-1:0] read_data_reg;

    initial begin
        for (int i = 0; i < NUMADDR; i++) begin
            memory[i] = RSTINIT;
        end
        read_delay_cnt = RSTSTRT;
        read_data_reg = RSTINIT;
    end

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (rst) begin
            for (int i = 0; i < NUMADDR; i++) begin
                memory[i] <= RSTINIT + i * RSTINCR;
            end
            read_delay_cnt <= RSTSTRT;
            read_data_reg <= RSTINIT;
        end else begin
            if (write_1) begin
                memory[wr_adr_1] <= wr_din_1;
            end
            if (read_0) begin
                if (read_delay_cnt == SRAM_DELAY) begin
                    read_data_reg <= memory[rd_adr_0];
                end else begin
                    read_delay_cnt <= read_delay_cnt + 1;
                end
            end
        end
    end

    assign ready = (read_delay_cnt == SRAM_DELAY);
    assign rd_dout_0 = read_data_reg;

    `ifdef FORMAL_FULL
        reg [BITDATA-1:0] formal_memory [0:NUMADDR-1];

        initial begin
            for (int i = 0; i < NUMADDR; i++) begin
                formal_memory[i] = RSTINIT + i * RSTINCR;
            end
        end

        always @(posedge clk) begin
            if (rst) begin
                for (int i = 0; i < NUMADDR; i++) begin
                    formal_memory[i] <= RSTINIT + i * RSTINCR;
                end
            end else begin
                if (write_1) begin
                    formal_memory[wr_adr_1] <= wr_din_1;
                end
                if (read_0) begin
                    assert(formal_memory[rd_adr_0] == read_data_reg);
                end
            end
        end
    `elsif FORMAL_SELECT
        reg [BITDATA-1:0] formal_memory;

        initial begin
            formal_memory = RSTINIT;
        end

        always @(posedge clk) begin
            if (rst) begin
                formal_memory <= RSTINIT;
            end else begin
                if (write_1 && select_adr == wr_adr_1) begin
                    formal_memory <= wr_din_1;
                end
                if (read_0 && select_adr == rd_adr_0) begin
                    assert(formal_memory == read_data_reg);
                end
            end
        end
    `endif

endmodule

set DESIGN_NAME_GOLDEN "origen_148701.v0"
set DESIGN_NAME "origen_148701.v1"
set TOP_NAME "origen_148701"


clear -all
check_sec -analyze -spec -sv ./input/rtl/${DESIGN_NAME_GOLDEN}.v
check_sec -analyze -imp -sv ./input/rtl/${DESIGN_NAME}.v
check_sec -elaborate -spec -top ${TOP_NAME} -disable_auto_bbox
check_sec -elaborate -imp -top ${TOP_NAME} -disable_auto_bbox
# check_sec -setup clock -infer reset -none
check_sec -setup 
check_sec -map -auto
clock clk 
reset -none
check_sec -gen
# check_sec -prove -strategy design_style -design_style_type clock_gating
# check_sec -prove
check_sec -prove -strategy proof
